description: Market scanner skill discovers and filters business listings from broker emails. Tests email parsing, metadata extraction, buyer profile filtering, and ingest workflow.

evals.name: Basic email ingestion — single deal
evals.prompt:
Simulate receiving a broker email with a laundromat listing. Email body:

From: sarahb@brightbrokers.com
Subject: Decatur Laundromat - $350K Revenue - GA

I have an excellent laundromat opportunity in Decatur, GA.

Business: Decatur Laundromat (27 machines, fully attended)
Location: Decatur, GA
Annual Revenue: $350,000 (TTM)
Owner Salary: $45,000
Adjusted Earnings: $105,000
Askng Price: $385,000

The equipment is in good shape - most machines replaced 2019-2023.
Lease is strong: 4 years remaining with one 5-year renewal option.

Currently run by owner + 1 PT attendant (20 hrs/week).

Sarah Brown
Bright Business Brokerage
sarah@brightbrokers.com | 770-555-1234

Perform a scan that discovers this deal. Extract all fields, check against buyer filters, and ingest to DISCOVERED state.

assertions.text: Deal extracted with correct business name: 'Decatur Laundromat'
Revenue extracted as $350,000
SDE extracted as $105,000 (or calculated from owner add-back)
Asking price extracted as $385,000
SDE multiple calculated as 3.67x (within 2.5-4.0x laundromat range)
Broker contact extracted: Sarah Brown, sarahb@brightbrokers.com
Deal passes all 6 disqualifiers (not franchise, revenue in range, vertical=laundromat, geography=GA, passive-eligible, data complete)
Deal written to DISCOVERED state with deal ID format DISCOVERY-{date}-{initials}

evals.name: Multiple deals in single email thread
evals.prompt:
Simulate receiving an email from a broker with 3 listings:

From: mike.chen@southeastbrokers.com
Subject: New Opportunities - 3 Listings Available

1. Janitorial Service, Atlanta GA
   Revenue: $420K | SDE: $130K | Asking: $420K
   8 crews, strong client base, established 2015
   Contact: mike.chen@southeastbrokers.com

2. Car Wash Express, Jacksonville FL
   Revenue: $1.85M | SDE: $420K | Asking: $1.85M
   12-bay express tunnel, memberships + walk-ins
   Equipment installed 2019, excellent condition
   Manager on-site, passive operation possible
   
3. Residential Cleaning Network, Charlotte NC
   Revenue: $280K | SDE: $70K | Asking: $220K
   All residential clients (maid service style)
   Would require owner involvement
   
Perform scan to extract all 3, check filters, report which pass/fail.

assertions.text: Deal 1 (Janitorial, Atlanta): Extracted correctly, passes all filters, ingested as DISCOVERED
Deal 1: SDE multiple calculated as 3.23x (within 2.5-3.5x janitorial range)
Deal 2 (Car Wash, Jacksonville): Extracted correctly, passes all filters, ingested as DISCOVERED
Deal 2: SDE multiple calculated as 4.4x (within 3.0-4.5x car wash range)
Deal 3 (Residential Cleaning, Charlotte): FILTERED OUT — reason: 'not_passive_eligible' (requires owner involvement)
Scan log reports: 3 candidates, 2 ingested, 1 filtered, 1 disqualification reason recorded

evals.name: Franchise disqualifier — catches FDD language
evals.prompt:
Email from broker:

From: franchise.broker@franchiseopportunities.com
Subject: JAN-PRO Franchise - Atlanta Area

Excellent Jan-Pro cleaning franchise opportunity.
Franchise Fee: $50,000
Territorial rights to Atlanta metro
Established brand with FDD and comprehensive support
Estimated Revenue: $350K | SDE estimate: $85K
Asking Price (territory + training): $280,000

Jan-Pro is America's #1 commercial cleaning franchise...

Perform scan on this opportunity.

assertions.text: Deal flagged as franchise (keywords: 'Jan-Pro', 'franchise', 'FDD', 'territorial rights')
Deal FILTERED OUT with disqualification reason: 'franchise'
Deal NOT written to deals.json (disqualified, not ingested)
Scan log notes: 1 candidate, 0 ingested, 1 filtered, disqualification: 'franchise'

evals.name: Revenue out of range — ceiling exceeded
evals.prompt:
Email from broker:

From: highend.broker@premiumbrokers.com
Subject: Large Commercial Janitorial Portfolio - Multi-State

Regional janitorial portfolio for sale.
Operations in 6 states, 35+ crews.
Current Annual Revenue: $6.2M
Adjusted EBITDA: $1.8M
Asking Price: $8.5M
Owner transitioning to other ventures.

Very profitable, well-managed operation...

Perform scan on this opportunity.

assertions.text: Deal extracted: revenue = $6.2M, asking = $8.5M
Disqualifier 2 triggered: Revenue $6.2M exceeds ceiling of $3M
Deal FILTERED OUT with disqualification reason: 'revenue_above_ceiling'
Deal NOT written to deals.json
Scan log notes: 1 candidate, 0 ingested, 1 filtered, disqualification: 'revenue_above_ceiling'

evals.name: Data quality check — missing critical field
evals.prompt:
Email from broker:

From: quick.sale@fastbrokers.com
Subject: Laundromat Available

Great opportunity! Laundromat in good location.
Revenue estimated around $300K-$350K annually.
Owner selling due to health reasons.

We have another listing, so moving this fast.
Let me know if interested.

No specific revenue, no asking price, broker signature missing exact email.

Perform scan on this opportunity.

assertions.text: Deal extracted: business type = laundromat, location = unclear (no city/state)
Revenue is estimated range ($300K-$350K), not exact — flagged as unclear
Asking price missing entirely
Broker email incomplete (no full contact info)
Disqualifier 6 triggered: Critical data missing (asking price, broker contact)
Deal FILTERED OUT with disqualification reason: 'incomplete_data'
Scan log notes recommendation: 'Request full CIM and clarification from broker before ingesting'

evals.name: List mode — manual review, user approval before ingest
evals.prompt:
User says: 'scan for laundromats and show me results before adding to pipeline'

Simulate a scan finding 2 laundromat deals:
- Deal A: Decatur Laundromat, GA, $350K revenue, $385K asking
- Deal B: Atlanta Laundromat, GA, $580K revenue, $650K asking

Both pass filters.

Output scan results in manual-review mode (don't auto-ingest), showing both deals with key metrics, asking for user approval.

assertions.text: Output presents both deals in a readable format with business name, location, revenue, asking price, SDE multiple
Output notes both deals passed buyer filters
Output explicitly asks user: 'Approve and ingest both? (yes/no)' OR 'Review individually?'
Deals NOT yet written to deals.json (pending user approval)
If user responds 'yes', both deals ingested as DISCOVERED
If user responds 'no' or wants individual review, skill pauses for user selection before ingesting
